ma.text: ma·má·mà·mả·mã·mạ — six words, one syllable, six tones.

bàn.text: ban·bán·bàn·bản·bãn·bạn — the tone picks the meaning.

cửa.text: hỏi tone (ả) — the classic dictation test even for natives.

mã.text: ngã tone (ã) — a rising-broken tone, hardest to hear.

phở.text: hỏi tone on ơ — the bowl every learner spells wrong first.

nướng.text: ươ + sắc — a stacked vowel with a rising tone.

biết.text: iê + sắc — 'to know', a three-part vowel.

người.text: ươ + huyền — 'person', the vowel that trips typists.

yêu.text: y+ê+u — 'to love', all vowels, no tone mark.

trường.text: tr + ươ + huyền — 'school', initial + stacked vowel.
